title: NYC sends out notices to those affected by Mamdani pied-à-terre tax
shortDescription: The pied-à-terre, unveiled earlier this year, is the biggest step made yet for one of Mamdani's major campaign points - taxing the rich.

title: Pied-à-terre tax homeowners given notice, Mamdani says
shortDescription: The pied-à-terre, unveiled earlier this year, is the biggest step made yet for one of Mamdani's major campaign points - taxing the rich.

title: These key Trump admin names won't attend White House press dinner
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump, Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio are among those not attending the rescheduled WHCA dinner.

title: Trump administration makes way for Penn Station rebranding
shortDescription: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy called the rebrand a priority after Trump had floated the idea of naming the station after him. What to know.

title: Trump administration makes way for Penn Station rebranding
shortDescription: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy called the rebrand a priority after Trump had floated the idea of naming the station after him. What to know.

title: New Trump tariffs spark global reaction
shortDescription: International leaders react as President Donald Trump places new tariffs on countries accused of allowing forced labor including Canada, China and the EU.

title: White House press dinner set for a redo after security breach in April
shortDescription: The annual event ended abruptly in April when a gunman rushed security in an assassination attempt against the president. Organizers are trying again.

title: Leavitt says Trump will not intervene in Tate brothers' case
shortDescription: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said that the Trump administration would not intervene in the extradition case of "manosphere" influencers Andrew and Tristian Tate at a July 23 press breifing.

title: The clock is ticking for Trump's daylight saving time push
shortDescription: President Trump has called the twice-yearly clock change an inconvenient nuisance. But a House-passed bill to end it may stall in the Senate.

title: How the 'Olive Garden standard' entered the voter ID debate
shortDescription: Republicans are seizing on an Olive Garden promotion to push for stricter voter ID laws, while critics note pasta isn't a constitutional right.

title: Trump hosts World Series champion Dodgers to White House
shortDescription: President Donald Trump honored the World Series champion Dodgers during a White House reception in the Rose Garden.

title: Trump hits countries accused of forced labor with fresh wave of tariffs
shortDescription: Trump imposes tariffs of 10% to 12.5% on countries accused of allowing forced labor, after the Supreme Court overturned previous emergency tariffs.

title: Kai Trump's trademark for clothing brand challenged by UK company
shortDescription: Kai Trump, the president's eldest granddaughter, had moved to trademark her name. A UK-based clothing brand 'KAI' argues it was selling goods first.

title: Trump's 'patience is running out' with John Thune over SAVE Act push
shortDescription: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt spoke about President Donald Trump's frustration as the GOP Senate leader struggles to pass the SAVE Act.

title: Anthony Fauci to testify about COVID-19 pandemic at Senate hearing
shortDescription: Anthony Fauci, who led the government's response to COVID-19, will testify at a Senate hearing after Sen. Rand Paul accused him of destroying records.

title: Trump jabs at Jon Ossoff. Today he hosts the Dodgers. Watch Trump news
shortDescription: President Donald Trump took aim at Jon Ossoff in Georgia. He announced a nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia. He will host the Dodgers today.
